message:
Add CLIP text-to-image search feature

- Integrate pure Zig CLIP text encoder (22KB WASM)
- Auto-download 290MB model on first text search
- Add text search UI in Vector Search tab
- Support example queries (cat, dog, sunset, etc.)
- Add clip-test.html for standalone CLIP testing

files.patch:
@@ -38,4 +38,10 @@ Thumbs.db
 # npm
 node_modules/
 
+# Large model files
+*.gguf
+
+# Allow specific wasm files in examples
+!examples/wasm/*.wasm
+
 CLAUDE.md
